title: Artifact Server Contract
allowed_changes: docs, DTOs, contract tests, adapter boundaries
forbidden_changes: frontend shell, chat-web, vendor subtree, runtime compose
done_when: contract tests pass and artifact lifecycle is documented

title: Chat Bridge Hermes Adapter
goal: wire chat bridge to the stabilized artifact contract
allowed_changes: bridge adapter docs, DTOs, SSE contract tests
forbidden_changes: direct provider calls from frontend, runtime changes outside adapter
done_when: bridge can run with authenticated session flow and audited link rewriting

title: RAG MCP External Service
goal: keep RAG as an independent MCP service or adapter
allowed_changes: service boundary docs, health/transport tests, config maps
forbidden_changes: front-end direct provider coupling, auth contract changes
done_when: service health and /mcp transport are stable with no UI provider access

title: Designer API Module
goal: treat designer API as optional backend module behind auth
allowed_changes: DTOs, file access policy, job status API docs/tests
forbidden_changes: frontend runtime replacement, auth contract changes
done_when: banner/job API is explicit and auditable behind backend

title: Apoema UI Entrypoints
goal: only after backend/adapter boundaries are fixed
allowed_changes: entrypoint mapping docs, visual smoke, route contract docs
done_when: Apoema routes render without legacy shell regressions

title: Authenticated UAT
goal: run manual smoke with isolated storageState outside repo
allowed_changes: UAT checklist, browser smoke notes, evidence storage outside repo
done_when: authenticated smoke passes and evidence stays out of version control

title: Pre-push Checklist
allowed_changes: git diff checks, secret scans, stage boundary review
done_when: docs-only or code-only changes are isolated and verified
